goal: Propose the molecular mechanism by which the PI3K-Akt pathway promotes cell survival, naming key effectors.
Identify regulatory mechanisms linking p53 to apoptosis under DNA damage.
Explain how the unfolded protein response signals through IRE1 to alter transcription.
Propose pathways linking chronic inflammation to insulin resistance in adipose tissue.
Describe the mechanism by which TGF-β drives epithelial-mesenchymal transition.
Identify the core regulators of the circadian clock feedback loop in mammals.
Explain how Wnt signaling stabilizes β-catenin to drive target-gene expression.
Propose the mechanism by which hypoxia stabilizes HIF-1α and reprograms metabolism.
Describe how the cGAS-STING pathway detects cytosolic DNA and triggers interferon.
Identify the mechanism by which mTORC1 integrates nutrient signals to control growth.
